Zhongli Xu йҚҫйӣўз·’
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhongli Xu (йҚҫйӣўз·’). Served in Wu as the Commandant of the Tower Ships. Zhongli Xu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom.
